description: Large notebook of Hebrew alphabet exercises. 11 folios. Dating is 16th-century or later based on the paleography and prelined paper. The name Elyaqim Dayyan and the date 27 Sivan appear on the back of the first page.
tags: 16th c or later, early modern, learning
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
